content: attached is the original breaking down in sketch of the organizations; we want to build and build to have a software/app development and a creative studio that will be a pixar or lucas arts business (i know crazy ); but met4 (and floating points and other visual and multimedia type projects will take other forms, For instance, Floating Points is a 2D rendering. At the moment, it's a video. But it could be in, and should be, in a museum, right? Like a room. Um, you know, with multiple sorts of screens or projections, so on and so forth. The idea being that we take seeds, we develop them in the format we currently are able to do, and then we branch out and translate them into different realms within our power at the moment. So then, in that vein, Metamorphosis, or Metamorph, whatever we're calling it, right, all these names are going to evolve through time, just like the project, LOL. Metamorphosis is starting as a text-based engine, because that's what we have the ability to do.
